form.formComment: Won two starts back over 342m at this track. Last start she finished 2nd on April 7 over 342m at this track behind Wirrulla Harry beaten 2.5 lengths (20.10) in a Other. Draw likely to suit. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.45) in a Other, finishing a 10 length fourth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Key chance and should go close.
